FR-01.title: Product Catalog Management
requirements: Add products with SKU, name, description, and category

FR-02.title: Stock Level Tracking
acceptance_criteria: Stock levels update on every transaction

FR-03.title: Purchase Order Management
requirements: Track PO status (draft, sent, received, completed)
acceptance_criteria: PO created with items and quantities

FR-04.title: Sales Order Processing
requirements: Create sales orders from customer requests

FR-05.title: Warehouse Zone Management
requirements: Define warehouse zones and bin locations
acceptance_criteria: Zones and bins created with identifiers

FR-08.title: Barcode Scanning
requirements: Scan barcodes for quick product lookup
Scan for receiving, picking, and counting

FR-09.title: Stock Counting and Reconciliation
requirements: Count entry by zone or full warehouse
Variance report comparing system vs physical

FR-10.title: Reporting and Analytics
requirements: Stock valuation report (FIFO, LIFO, weighted average)

FR-01.title: Build Product Catalog API
FR-01.description: Create CRUD for products with SKU (unique), variants as child records. Barcode generation service (Code128/QR). POST /api/products/import (CSV/Excel parser with validation).

FR-01.title: Build Product Management UI
FR-01.description: Create product list with search and category filters. Product form with variant builder (matrix of options), barcode preview, and bulk import wizard with field mapping.

FR-01.title: Create Product Database Schema
FR-01.description: Design products table: id, sku (unique), name, description, category_id, barcode. variants table: product_id, sku, attributes (JSON), barcode. categories table with hierarchy.

FR-02.title: Build Stock Tracking API
FR-02.description: Create GET /api/stock (per product per warehouse). GET /api/stock/movements (history with filters). Batch/serial tracking endpoints. Expiry date alerts via scheduled job.

FR-02.title: Build Stock Dashboard
FR-02.description: Create stock overview with product list showing quantities per warehouse, movement history timeline, batch/serial lookup, and expiry calendar with warning indicators.

FR-03.title: Build Purchase Order API
FR-03.description: Create CRUD for POs: supplier, items, quantities, expected date. Status workflow (draft→sent→partially_received→completed). POST /api/po/:id/receive (partial receiving). Auto-update stock.

FR-03.title: Build PO Management UI
FR-03.description: Create PO list with status filters. PO form with supplier selector, item picker, quantities. Receiving interface with quantity input per item. Status workflow indicators.

FR-04.title: Build Sales Order API
FR-04.description: Create POST /api/sales-orders (customer, items). Reserve stock atomically. Workflow: POST /api/orders/:id/pick, /pack, /ship. Generate invoice PDF on ship.

FR-04.title: Build Sales Order UI
FR-04.description: Create order entry form with customer and product selection. Order list with workflow stage badges. Pick list print, pack confirmation, ship with tracking number. Invoice preview.

FR-05.title: Build Warehouse Zone API
FR-05.description: Create CRUD for zones (name, type) and bins (zone_id, identifier, capacity). Product-to-bin assignments. GET /api/picking/optimize (zone-based route algorithm).

FR-05.title: Build Warehouse Layout UI
FR-05.description: Create visual warehouse map with zone grid, bin assignments, capacity bars, and picking route visualization.

FR-06.title: Build Transfer API
FR-06.description: Create POST /api/transfers (source, destination, items). Approval workflow. In-transit status tracking. POST /api/transfers/:id/receive (confirmation at destination).

FR-06.title: Build Transfer UI
FR-06.description: Create transfer request form, approval queue, in-transit tracking list, and receiving confirmation interface.

FR-07.title: Build Reorder Service
FR-07.description: Create reorder point config per product. Scheduled job checks stock vs reorder point. Auto-generate suggested PO. Email notification to procurement team.

FR-07.title: Build Reorder Settings UI
FR-07.description: Create reorder configuration page with product table showing current stock, reorder point, and reorder quantity. Alert log and suggested PO review.

FR-08.title: Build Barcode Scanning API
FR-08.description: Create POST /api/scan (barcode value, context: receive/pick/count). Validate scanned item against expected. Return product details. Mobile-optimized endpoints.

FR-08.title: Build Scanner Interface
FR-08.description: Create mobile-responsive scanning screen using device camera. Scan result overlay with product and action buttons. Mismatch error with expected vs scanned.

FR-09.title: Build Stock Count API
FR-09.description: Create POST /api/stock-counts (schedule by zone/full). POST /api/stock-counts/:id/entries (physical counts). GET /api/stock-counts/:id/variance. POST /api/stock-counts/:id/adjust.

FR-09.title: Build Stock Count UI
FR-09.description: Create count scheduling, entry form by location with expected vs counted, variance report table with highlights, and adjustment approval workflow.

FR-10.title: Build Inventory Reports API
FR-10.description: Create GET /api/reports/valuation (method param: FIFO/LIFO/weighted). /api/reports/turnover. /api/reports/dead-stock. Custom report query builder.

FR-10.title: Build Reports Dashboard
FR-10.description: Create reports page with valuation method selector, turnover chart by category, dead stock table with aging, and custom report builder with dimension/filter/export.
